overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character in dark armor with a red cape walking through a misty mountain valley. The character passes a massive stationary stone golem guardian, then traverses an open field filled with ancient gravestones, grazing sheep, and ruined stone structures, eventually approaching a spirit spring shrine.

events.description: passing the giant stone knight and transitioning from narrow valley into open field

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the massive stone golem guardian holding a large axe

notable_agents.action: giant armored stone knight standing motionless with large double-bladed axe as the player passes by

entered.detail: tall ancient stone castle with spires visible through the mist
steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation
steep rocky cliff face towering over the path
brown autumn grass covering the ground
tall thin pine trees with sparse brown needles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow misty mountain valley flanked by steep cliffs. The player character walks forward past a massive stationary stone golem knight wielding a large axe on the right. In the distance, ancient castle ruins are visible through the haze as the character approaches the exit of the valley into a more open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty field with scattered ancient gravestones

agents.ego_description: walking through the tall grass field examining the ancient gravestones

entered.detail: scattered upright stone markers and tombstones throughout the tall grass

segments.scene_description: Having exited the narrow valley, the character now walks through a wide open field covered in tall brown grass. Ancient stone gravestones begin appearing scattered throughout the field. The left mountain cliff remains visible in the distance while the right cliff fades from view. The castle ruins remain visible ahead through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: field with dense gravestones and grazing animals

events.description: sheep become visible grazing in the field among the gravestones

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the field past grazing sheep and dense gravestones

notable_agents.action: sheep grazing peacefully in the tall grass among the gravestones

entered.detail: ancient crumbling stone wall ruins visible on the right side
tall rectangular stone pillar or monolith standing upright in the field

segments.scene_description: The field becomes denser with ancient gravestones surrounding the path. Sheep appear grazing peacefully among the stones. The character passes a tall stone pillar on the left and approaches crumbling stone ruins. The mountain cliffs have receded into the misty background, creating a more enclosed atmosphere within the ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient shrine approach with spirit spring

events.description: approaching the spirit spring shrine triggers a UI interaction prompt to use the spirit spring

agents.ego_description: walking toward the stone shrine structure preparing to interact with the spirit spring

notable_agents.action: sheep grazing close to the path near the shrine entrance

entered.detail: ancient stone shrine structure with glowing lantern and spirit spring for fast travel

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stone shrine structure in the field. A sheep grazes nearby on the left. The spirit spring shrine becomes the focal point with its distinctive stone construction. As the character gets close, a UI interaction prompt appears, indicating the spirit spring can be used. The castle ruins remain visible in the distant mist throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic mountain pass into an expansive, mist-shrouded field of ruins. It begins in a narrow valley flanked by steep cliffs, where the character walks past a massive, stationary stone golem knight while distant castle ruins loom through the haze. As the character exits the valley, the terrain opens into a wide field of tall brown grass where scattered ancient gravestones first appear and the surrounding cliffs begin to recede. The scene then shifts into a denser graveyard populated by grazing sheep and crumbling stone pillars, creating a more enclosed atmosphere as the character navigates the ruins. Finally, the camera approaches a distinctive stone spirit spring shrine, with a UI interaction prompt appearing as the distant castle remains a constant silhouette in the mist.
